title: Brazilian Cherry Skewers with Savoury Glaze
description: A sweet and savory Brazilian-inspired dish featuring cherry tomatoes and onions, marinated in a zesty citrus glaze and grilled to perfection.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together Brazilian-style seasoning, lime juice, and honey.
3. Add sliced onions and cherry tomatoes to the bowl and toss to coat with marinade.
4. Thread marinated onions and cherry tomatoes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. Brush skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
6. Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until onions are caramelized and cherry tomatoes are tender.
7. Meanwhile, mix crumbled savory cheese with a pinch of salt and pepper.
8. Remove skewers from grill and sprinkle with savory cheese.
